title: Michael Mayhem
description: The 7-Elevens have started to conquer the minecraft world... can you stop them?
body:
![Michael](https://i.postimg.cc/NMwdmjKV/Golden-egg-studios.png)

**The Michael Mayhem is a very stupid mod that includes multiple intentionally devious and unique entities, weapons and structures alongside an extensive storyline....**

![Jose Text 1](https://i.postimg.cc/N0TkbvTH/Projekt-bez-nazwy-15.png)

**As it currently stands, you have to help Michael and the Mogus defeat the 7-Eleven and Los Pollos Hermanos, who are ruining the quaint Jim York with their unfair taxes. It's pretty clear from the start that something isn't quite right with their structures they've built....**

![Jose Image 2](https://i.postimg.cc/BnvKX9M0/Projekt-bez-nazwy-16.png)

**Helping the various Michael and Mogus against the 7-Elevens and their mass produced mimigus imposter clones will clear the way to succession.
Many of them have been released out into the world.... so there's a good chance one will find you in the darkness. It's a challenge fighting through the ItsJim content, however Michael is there to help you early on!!!**

![Jose Image 3](https://i.postimg.cc/hGdhdSmH/Projekt-bez-nazwy-17.png)

**The Mogus even have their own structures and will engage combat against the 7-Eleven entities when spotted.**

 

**Other than these you also have to defeat various 711 leaders that can be found in underwater biomes, end islands and in the new space dimension. It is up to you to stop them before its too late!!**

![FISHUS](https://i.postimg.cc/T1PVhncb/image.png)

**Current features:**

- **Over 30 + new mobs**

- **New dimension filled with custom biomes features and mobs**

- **A lot of new miscellanous items such as foods, currencies and even timed boms**

- **Over 35+ new mobs and bosses**

- **Entire new armour sets**

- **A lot of new blocks, structures and terrain alterations**

- **And MUCH more ( thats a lot)**

**Some videos with the mod:**



**The mod is still wip so expect some changes to it!**
**Also if you find a bug or want to propose an idea for a future update here is the discord link:**

**https://discord.gg/tDDZtzvZQ7**

**(The Scratazon Mothership structure spawns high up from where it would be found with the locate command!!)**

**BIT OF AN UPDATE: If you'd like to play this mod with the programmer art style, then check out this resourcepack:** 
[michael-mayhem-programer-art](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/michael-mayhem-programer-art)
